routines.name: lfrz-pattern
routines.summary: Freeze all layers matching a wildcard pattern.

routines.name: liso-wildcard
routines.summary: Isolate layers matching a wildcard by freezing all others.

routines.name: layreport
routines.summary: Write a CSV inventory of every layer plus entity counts.

routines.name: laysave-set
routines.summary: Save (LAYSAVE-SET) or restore (LAYREST-SET) a named layer state.

routines.name: layxref-color
routines.summary: Set every xref-dependent layer to a single AutoCAD Color Index.

routines.name: layunused
routines.summary: Report layers that have zero entities in modelspace or paperspace.

routines.name: exportpnt-pnezd
routines.summary: Export Civil 3D COGO points to a PNEZD CSV.

routines.name: exportpnt-csv
routines.summary: Export COGO points to CSV with user-chosen field order (P,N,E,Z,D).

routines.name: importpnt-fromdc
routines.summary: Import data-collector CSV with format auto-detect; creates POINT+TEXT.

routines.name: pntrenum
routines.summary: Renumber selected COGO points by pick order with collision check.

routines.name: pntfilter-desc
routines.summary: Select COGO points whose raw description matches a wildcard.

routines.name: pntchk-dup
routines.summary: Find duplicate COGO point numbers in the drawing.

routines.name: pntmove-byelev
routines.summary: Shift selected COGO point elevations by a signed delta.

routines.name: inv
routines.summary: Inverse two picked points; reports bearing, distance, azimuth.

routines.name: invpline
routines.summary: Inverse along a polyline vertex by vertex; CSV output.

routines.name: trav
routines.summary: Interactive traverse entry by bearing+distance; draws polyline.

routines.name: travclose
routines.summary: Compute traverse closure on a polyline (lat/dep, precision 1:N).

routines.name: bearlabel
routines.summary: Label one line/polyline segment with bearing+distance text.

routines.name: bearlabel-all
routines.summary: Label every straight segment of a polyline with bearing+distance.

routines.name: curvelabel
routines.summary: Label an ARC entity with R, L, and central angle Delta.

routines.name: curvelabel-all
routines.summary: Label every arc segment of a polyline with R, L, Delta.

routines.name: radialstake
routines.summary: Radial stakeout report (distance/azimuth/angle-right) from base+backsight.

routines.name: midpt-stake
routines.summary: Midpoint of two points or half-length point along a polyline.

routines.name: perp-stake
routines.summary: Station and signed perpendicular offset from a two-point baseline.

routines.name: bnd-trav
routines.summary: Boundary traverse table (Course/From/To/Bearing/Distance) from polyline.
